title: Findings Regarding the Market Events of May 6, 2010 (Report of the Staffs of the CFTC and SEC to the Joint Advisory Committee on Emerging Regulatory Issues)
organization: U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission & U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission
bias_or_interest: Government regulators' joint forensic report. Authoritative for the crash mechanics and the large E-mini sell program.
relevant_locations: Large fundamental seller: 75,000 E-mini contracts (~$4.1B) via price-insensitive algorithm
quotation_note: Government work; factual. Use for crash facts and the W&R-style sell program as a key factor.
notes: Initial official autopsy; barely mentions a London trader. Durable hash to be computed before publish.

title: The Flash Crash: The Impact of High Frequency Trading on an Electronic Market (CFTC Office of the Chief Economist working paper)
author: Andrei Kirilenko, Albert S. Kyle, Mehrdad Samadi, Tugkan Tuzun
organization: U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (Office of the Chief Economist)
bias_or_interest: Academic study by regulator economists. Authoritative for HFT's role.
relevant_locations: HFT 'did not cause the Flash Crash, but contributed to it by demanding immediacy ahead of other participants'
quotation_note: Use the 'did not cause but contributed' framing verbatim in spirit; attribute to the study.
notes: Key for the causation nuance (HFT contributed, did not cause).

title: Futures Trader Pleads Guilty to Illegally Manipulating the Futures Market in Connection with 2010 'Flash Crash' (DOJ press release)
organization: U.S. Department of Justice (Office of Public Affairs)
bias_or_interest: Prosecution record. Authoritative for the guilty plea (wire fraud + spoofing), the $12.8M admission, and the conduct period.
relevant_locations: Guilty plea: one count wire fraud + one count spoofing
Modified automated trading program; Jan 2009-Apr 2014; E-mini S&P 500 on CME
quotation_note: State the guilty plea as fact. State the crash link as 'contributed', not 'caused'.
notes: Primary for the plea and the spoofing mechanism. Durable hash pending.

title: United States v. Navinder Singh Sarao (case page)
bias_or_interest: Prosecution case record. Charges, plea, sentencing posture.
notes: Case docket reference for charges through sentencing.

title: CFTC Charges U.K. Resident Navinder Singh Sarao and His Company with Price Manipulation and Spoofing (Press Release 7156-15)
bias_or_interest: Regulator charging document. Authoritative for the spoofing allegations and the >$40M figure.
relevant_locations: Significantly responsible for order imbalances that contributed to the Flash Crash
quotation_note: Use 'significantly responsible for the order imbalances' / 'contributed'. Not 'caused'.
notes: Source for the 'significantly responsible / contributed' attribution and the >$40M allegation.

title: Flash crash trader Navinder Singh Sarao sentenced to home detention (CNBC)
bias_or_interest: Mainstream financial news. Used for the 2020 sentence (1 year home incarceration), the autism mitigation, and the lost-fortune detail; cross-check vs court records.
relevant_locations: Sentenced to one year of home detention; faced up to ~8 years
quotation_note: Secondary; cross-check sentence vs DOJ/court before publish. Attribute the specialist quote.
rights_note: News article; summarize, do not reproduce at length.
notes: Sentencing + mitigation. Verify against the sentencing record at fact_recheck.

title: 2010 flash crash (overview)
bias_or_interest: Neutral aggregator. Used for timeline/figures cross-check (36 minutes, 998.5 points, ~$1T).
quotation_note: Cross-check only; do not cite as primary.

title: Flash Crash: A Trading Savant, a Global Manhunt, and the Most Mysterious Market Crash in History
author: Liam Vaughan
bias_or_interest: Investigative book; the definitive narrative account of Sarao. Used for human/biographical context; cross-check specifics against primary records.
relevant_locations: Biography, Hounslow, trading style, the lost fortune, the manhunt
quotation_note: Narrative source; do not quote at length; verify load-bearing facts against primary.
rights_note: Copyrighted book; ideas/facts only, no extended quotation.
notes: Color and human context. Not used for legal/causation assertions.
